meta.description: An instance of a Pipeline execution — records the artifact chain and per-step logs produced during a run

skills.claude: A Pipeline Run is the live state and audit log of a pipeline execution. The 'steps' array is updated after each step completes — steps[N].output holds the Kanecta UUID of the artifact produced, which becomes the input for step N+1 (steps[N+1].input). The Pipeline Run item's children in the Kanecta tree are the artifact objects produced at each step. To resume a failed run, read the last completed step's output UUID and restart from the next step.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_fe0ec59e_207c_447f_b07f_18b201551543" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "pipeline" UUID,
    "status" TEXT,
    "started_at" TEXT,
    "completed_at" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_fe0ec59e_207c_447f_b07f_18b201551543" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_fe0ec59e207c447f_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_fe0ec59e207c447f_pipeline" FOREIGN KEY ("pipeline") REFERENCES items(id)
)
